options.text: Up For Grabs - Copy to Circle

config.description: When results come in from taking this exam what progress tracker type should they be linked to.
config.label: Progress Tracker Type [del?]

config.description: make sure title matches classmarker or proprofs exactly as we use this app as a lookup to match corresponding test results to the student's progress tracker
config.label: Test Name

config.description: You can only pick one. Pick PBC, FBC, MTA, etc for Courses. Use Blitz/Practice Exam for any Blitz or Progress exam regardless of specialty.
config.label: Progress Tracker Type

config.description: This is our prefered type of question.  Scroll to the bottom of the list to add a new one.  You might want to have this test container app opened in another app for reference.
config.label: [RETIRING] Multi-Choice Questions

config.description: This is 2nd prefered type of question.  Scroll to the bottom of the list to add a new one.  You might want to have this test container app opened in another app for reference.
config.label: [RETIRING] True / False Questions

config.description: This is third prefered type of question - most certification exams are only looking for one response.  Scroll to the bottom of the list to add a new one.  You might want to have this test container app opened in another app for reference.
config.label: [RETIRING] Multi Response Questions

config.description: Put link to proprofs "quiz" or classmarker "exam"
config.label: Finished Product Link(s)

config.description: AKA as Fill in the Blank - a grading nightmare. Avoid this type of question unless absolutely necessary. Scroll to the bottom of the list to add a new one.  You might want to have this test container app opened in another app for reference.
config.label: [RETIRING] Free Text Questions

config.description: Similar to the Free Text / Filling the Blank Question - Avoid if at all possible as it requires manual grading.  Scroll to the bottom of the list to add a new one.  You might want to have this test container app opened in another app for reference.
config.label: [RETIRING] Essay Questions
